extra_info.Dynamic Filters: optional: p_partkey>=200068 AND optional: p_partkey<=399725 AND optional: p_partkey IN BF(l_partkey)

extra_info.Filters: l_comment>='nt requests according to the quickly' AND l_comment<='packages cajole slyly e'
r_comment>='ges. thinly even pinto beans ca' AND r_comment<='ges. thinly even pinto beans ca'
